results.title: Paige Bueckers Outraged After Getting Technical Foul For Clapping
results.description: Dallas Wings All-Star guard Paige Bueckers had a rough game at Atlanta, made more frustrating by an absurd technical foul call.

results.title: Miami Marlins take game 1 of the series against New York Mets 2-1 despite Juan Soto's homer in 1st
results.description: Eury Pérez gave up just Juan Soto's solo homer in the first inning and was solid pitching into the seventh, Owen Caissie drove in both of Miami's runs and the Marlins edged the New York Mets 2-1.
